info.name: BSICARDS
info.description:
The collection lets you integrate BSICards Card Issuance API

Register for an account at [www.bsigroup.tech](http://www.bsigroup.tech)

item.description:
#### **You can use the sample data and test credentials for running on sandbox. These Mastercards support 3DS in app authentication, over 6+ coins to USD, Gpay/Apple Pay ( Subject to your KYB Approval )

**Kindly ensure you use the correct URL for your reseller account. Share the API keys with your merchants.****

item.name: Webhooks
item.description:
This has a list of webhook events that are triggered. Update your webhook url in your settings page.

Currently webhooks which do not receive a 200 OK response are retried every 10mins for a maximum of 24hours.

All Request are sent as POST and header contains your secret key, validate your secret key to ensure the request is sent from the right source.

Webhooks are currently not available directly to your reseller, they will be sent to your webhook url.

**Mastecard - New Card**

``` json
{
  "event": "mastercard.newcard",
  "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
  "nameoncard": "John Doe",
  "brand": "master",
  "status": "requested"
}

 ```

**Visacard - New Card**

``` json
{
  "event": "visacard.newcard",
  "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
  "nameoncard": "John Doe",
  "brand": "visa",
  "status": "requested"
}

 ```

**Digital Mastercard - New Card or Reseller Digital Mastercard New**

``` json
{
  "event": "digitalcard.newcard", // can be digitalcard.newcard or resellerdigitalcard.newcard
  "useremail": "test11@bsigroup.com",
  "nameoncard": "John Doe",
  "brand": "digital",
  "type": "virtual",
  "cardid": "crd-a27fa1df-485e-44bd-b6e5-95e8fbf9a59b",
  "usdtaddress": "0x59Fa8909b686dA812b80218B43EE722b4ceC99fb",
  "btcdepositaddress": "35TTBguiCaE5wmpwKKBHLLMfFroVCjkxqF",
  "ethdepositaddress": "0x49C4c98650b8083ece4d8651078E6bdEf16C47f8",
  "soldepositaddress": "5vFKiPH8UtNGPpEwpdyqKH8xJHyKt9S6z6BtD7eLK5Ua",
  "bnbdepositaddress": "0x1DDDf04852Ba00658aCCb4bF7e25c6c8ff503b8e",
  "xrpdepositaddress": "0xE40E1aB0C769E220c89BFc323d7de692Ad028275",
  "paxgdepositaddress": "0xF3F556d75805100006a6E734D0D20D9726567838",
  "depositaddress": "0xd234cc6f5a286BCE251Ff3c1385463b3f5b3dcdc",
  "status": "issued"
}

 ```

**Visa / Mastercard Approved by Admin**

``` json
{
  "event": "visacard.cardissued",
  "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
  "cardid": "f4dfa9fd-7d6f-4313-9a33-761a6eb3286e",
  "nameoncard": "John Doe",
  "brand": "visa",
  "status": "requested"
}

 ```

``` json
{
  "event": "mastercard.cardissued",
  "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
  "cardid": "a63ed306f62d430e8ce2ec29a118d0a4",
  "nameoncard": "John Doe",
  "brand": "master",
  "status": "requested"
}

 ```

**VISA/MASTERCARD Cancel Card Issuance**

``` json
{
  "event": "cardrequest.deleted",
  "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
  "nameoncard": "John Doe",
  "brand": "visa", // can be visa or master depending on the request cancelled
  "status": "deleted"
}

 ```

**MASTERCARD FUNDING REQUEST**

``` json
{
  "event": "fundrequest.approved",
  "useremail": "nash821@xenio.in",
  "nameoncard": "John Doe",
  "brand": "master",
  "cardid": "877d8acc33be49d3ab68f176027200fe",
  "amount": 10000, // amount is in cents
  "status": "requested"
}

 ```

**VISA FUNDING REQUEST**

``` json
{
  "event": "fundrequest.approved",
  "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
  "nameoncard": "John Doe",
  "brand": "visa",
  "cardid": "2a6309c4-2b03-4bc3-b791-5876fc11aa8f",
  "amount": 5000, // amount is in cents
  "status": "requested"
}

 ```

**VISA/MASTERCARD Cancel Funding Request**

``` json
{
  "event": "fundrequest.deleted",
  "useremail": "nash821@xenio.in",
  "nameoncard": "John Doe",
  "brand": "master", // can be master or visa
  "cardid": "2b4176d6c35649beb1d01b760e37c31c",
  "amount": "1500", // amount is in cents
  "status": "requested"
}

 ```

**Digital Mastercard 3DS Requested**

``` json
{
  "event": "digitalcard.cardauthorization",
  "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
  "cardid": "crd-343-34343423-65634563454",
  "merchantName": "Amazon",
  "maskedPan" : "5358XXXXXXXX5656",
  "merchantAmount" : "50.00",
  "merchantCurrency" : "USD",
  "eventId" : "evn-34234-erte45-joor3663"
}

 ```

**Visa Card Terminated**

``` json
{
  "event": "visacard.terminated",
  "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
  "cardid" : "e23234523423423432432",
  "brand" : "visa"
}

 ```

**Digital Card Transaction Authorization**

``` json
{
    "event": "digitalcard.transaction",
    "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
    "cardid": "crd-343-34343423-65634563454",
    "merchantName": "Amazon",
    "merchantAmount": "50.00",
    "merchantCurrency": "USD",
    "amount": "50.00",
    "currency": "USD",
    "type": "payment" // Can be 'payment' | 'refund'
}

 ```

**Digital Card Transaction Declined**

``` json
{
    "event": "digitalcard.transaction",
    "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
    "cardid": "crd-343-34343423-65634563454",
    "merchantName": "Amazon",
    "merchantAmount": "50.00",
    "merchantCurrency": "USD",
    "amount": "50.00",
    "currency": "USD",
    "declineReasonCode" : "insufficientFund", // Can be 'insufficientFund' | 'failedControl' | 'notActive' | 'other'
    "type": "payment" // Can be 'payment' | 'refund'
    "partneremail" : "your@email.com"
}

 ```

**Digital Card Blockchain Activity**

``` json
{
    "event": "digitalcard.blockchain",
    "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
    "cardid": "crd-343-34343423-65634563454",
    "amount": "500000", // 6 decimal
    "transactionHash": "xfdtDF3454DFfxgfgsdfsdr453xdF",
    "type" : "settlement" // can be "settlement" | "refund" | "deposit" | "transferOutOrApproval" | "withdraw"
}

 ```

**Digital Card xpay activation code**

``` json
{
    "event": "digitalcard.xpayactivation",
    "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
    "cardid": "crd-343-34343423-65634563454",
    "digitalWalletName": "googlePay", // can be googlePay / applePay
    "activationCode": "123456",
}

 ```

**Card cancellation warning - If points balance is over -4000**

``` json
{
    "event": "cardcancellation.warning",
    "useremail": "test@bsigroup.tech",
    "cardid": "crd-343-34343423-65634563454",
    "points": -4589,
}

 ```

Digital Card Funding Request

``` json
{
"event":"digitalcard.fundrequest",
"useremail":"test@bsigroup.tech",
"brand":"digital",
"type":"virtual",
"cardid":"crd-687f4d1c-a294-4fa6-a66c-f2ba1a4e724f",
"amount":50,
"status":"Request received, processing time 24hours"
}

 ```

Digital Card Funding Approved

``` json
{
"event":"digitalcard.funded",
"useremail":"test@bsigroup.tech",
"brand":"digital",
"type":"virtual",
"cardid":"crd-687f4d1c-a294-4fa6-a66c-f2ba1a4e724f",
"amount":50,
"status":"Funding Complete"
}

 ```
